title: Suggest Submit: Similarity Nudge with Merge Command
desc: After filing a suggest, shows related existing suggests (>=40% word overlap) and a ready-to-run merge command. Best-effort, never breaks submit.
steps: Word overlap check: tokenize new+existing titles,
Top 3 matches printed with ts + title preview + overlap %
Ready-to-run merge command: wkappbot suggest merge --all-matching using top-2 non-stopword tokens
Excludes resolved entries, merge records, and the new entry itself

requirements.expect: [SUGGEST:SIMILAR] N related suggest(s) found when similar open suggests exist
no SIMILAR output (silent on no match)
prints Ready to merge: wkappbot suggest merge --all-matching command

requirements.cmd: wkappbot suggest "test similarity nudge" --requirement "wkappbot suggest list
requirements.expect: prints suggests" --requirement "wkappbot suggest list => exit 0" --requirement "wkappbot suggest show 1 => prints first" => prints [SUGGEST:SIMILAR] block
requirements.prompt: suggest submit similarity nudge + copy-paste merge command. Commit 87404f89.

requirements.expect: unrelated suggests do not trigger nudge
requirements.prompt: suggest submit similarity nudge + copy-paste merge command. Commit 87404f89.

requirements.cmd: wkappbot suggest "unrelated foo bar baz topic xyzzy" --requirement "wkappbot suggest list
requirements.expect: ok" --requirement "wkappbot suggest list => ok" --requirement "wkappbot suggest list => ok" => no [SUGGEST:SIMILAR] line printed
requirements.prompt: suggest submit similarity nudge + copy-paste merge command. Commit 87404f89.

requirements.expect: Tip: similar suggests found: wkappbot suggest merge ts1 ts2 --title ...
requirements.prompt: suggest submit show similarity nudge + copy-paste merge command. Commit 2735d3cf.

primary_cmd: wkappbot suggest "test similarity nudge" --requirement "wkappbot suggest list
author: claude
